query:
SELECT e.entity_id
            FROM "ob-poc".cbu_entity_roles cer
            JOIN "ob-poc".entities e ON e.entity_id = cer.entity_id
            JOIN "ob-poc".roles r ON r.role_id = cer.role_id
            WHERE cer.cbu_id = $1
              AND e.deleted_at IS NULL
              AND r.name IN ('Primary Entity', 'Main Entity', 'Client')
            LIMIT 1
